TEMPLATE_NAME: Hybrid Cloud Data Lakehouse with Iceberg
DESCRIPTION: Hybrid Cloud Lakehouse with Iceberg: Best practices: External Volume for cross-region storage, Catalog Integration with AWS Glue or Polaris, External Iceberg tables for catalog-managed data, convert to Snowflake-managed for full platform support, Iceberg REST API for external engine access (Spark, Trino, Dremio), lowercase identifiers for case-sensitive catalogs.
